title: EnergyCommunityConsumption
description: Energy consumption measurement for a community member, derived from the ACMeasurement Smart Data Model. Captures active/reactive power, energy import/export, voltage, and frequency from smart meters.

id.description: Unique identifier of the entity in URN format (urn:ngsi-ld:EnergyCommunityConsumption:<instance-id>)

type.description: NGSI-LD entity type. Must be EnergyCommunityConsumption.

activePower.description: Current active power consumption measured by the smart meter, in Watts (W). Derived from ACMeasurement.

reactivePower.description: Reactive power measured by the smart meter, in Volt-Ampere reactive (VAr). Derived from ACMeasurement.

activeEnergyImport.description: Cumulative active energy imported from the grid, in kilowatt-hours (kWh). Derived from ACMeasurement.

activeEnergyExport.description: Cumulative active energy exported to the grid, in kilowatt-hours (kWh). Derived from ACMeasurement.

voltage.description: Line voltage measured at the smart meter, in Volts (V). Derived from ACMeasurement.

frequency.description: Grid frequency measured at the smart meter, in Hertz (Hz). Derived from ACMeasurement.

dateObserved.description: Timestamp of the measurement observation in ISO 8601 format.

address.description: Postal address of the smart meter location.

location.description: GeoJSON Point geometry representing the smart meter location.

coordinates.description: GeoJSON coordinates [longitude, latitude] or [longitude, latitude, altitude].

refDevice.description: URN reference to the smart meter device entity (e.g., urn:ngsi-ld:Device:smartmeter-001).

refMember.description: URN reference to the EnergyCommunityMember entity associated with this consumption measurement.
